# Xellvio

> Xellvio is a global bulk SMS platform — send fast, reliable, compliant SMS campaigns worldwide with scheduling, analytics, sender IDs, and a developer API.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and getting started.
- [Features](/features): Bulk messaging, scheduling, analytics, contacts, API, automation.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Use cases by industry and workflow.
- [Email to SMS](/solutions/email-to-sms): Send SMS directly from email — gateway guide and setup.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Per-country SMS pricing and credit packs.
- [Docs](/docs): API reference, setup, and sending checklist.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Xellvio team.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
- [Acceptable Use Policy](/aup)
- [Anti-Spam Policy](/anti-spam)
- [SMS Terms](/sms-terms)
- [Cookies](/cookies)
- [DPA](/dpa)
